title: Consciousness helm
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Consciousness_Helm.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Meetra Surik]] wearing a consciousness helm]]
A '''consciousness helm''' was a type of helmet that saw use during and after the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Its name was derived not from any effect it had on the mind, but for its ability to literally keep its wearer conscious during a fight.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
